Off Calendar Mar-03-2023 Set For Case Management Conference On Aug-27-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn For Dismissal
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Darrow Boggiano; 415-933-4433; defendant in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.
Nils Rosenquest; Rosenquest & Associates; 415-292-0980; appearing for plaintiff Ping Yuen North, LP.

Defendant contests the court's tentative ruling, but states that they did not give notice to opposing counsel that they would be contesting, nor see the court's tentative ruling until arriving at court this morning. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DARROW BOGGIANO'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. The proof of service on file is signed by the defendant (who is a party to this action) and does not include the required information (e.g. date of service, sender's e-mail address, recipient's e-mail address). Additionally, this motion was not set on sufficient notice, having be filed on February 3, 2023 for February 27, 2023 hearing.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brett Gibbs, 415-292-090 of Rosenquest & Assoicates appearing in person for Plaintiff Ping Yue North, L.P.
Darrow Boggiano, 415-993-4433 Defendant in Pro Per appearing in person. (via Zoom at 1:30)

Hearing held. Ms. Boggiano is sworn and gives testimony.

The Court rules as follows: Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is Granted. The Court Grants a three year prelimiary injunction. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the Court rules as follows: Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is continued to June 10, 2022 on Court's own motion. Per stipulation of counsel the hearing date was moved from June 9, 2022. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
